description: Menghitung jumlah siswa (opsional filter kelas)
sql_template:
WITH target AS (
    SELECT g.academic_year, g.semester, s.id
    FROM students s
    JOIN grades g ON g.student_id = s.id
    WHERE ('{kelas}' = '' OR g.class = '{kelas}' OR g.class LIKE '{kelas} %')
        AND g.academic_year IN ('{academic_year}')
        AND g.semester IN ('{semester}')
)
SELECT academic_year, semester, COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS count
FROM target
GROUP BY academic_year, semester
ORDER BY academic_year, semester
examples: Berapa siswa di kelas X IPA?

description: Menghitung jumlah siswa yang namanya mengandung kata tertentu
sql_template:
WITH filtered AS (
    SELECT g.academic_year, g.semester, s.id
    FROM students s
    JOIN grades g ON g.student_id = s.id
    WHERE (s.name LIKE '%{nama}%'{extra_nama_clause})
        AND g.academic_year IN ('{academic_year}')
        AND g.semester IN ('{semester}')
)
SELECT academic_year, semester, COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS count
FROM filtered
GROUP BY academic_year, semester
ORDER BY academic_year, semester

params.nama: Nama atau potongan nama siswa (contoh: Dewi, Budi)

description: Daftar siswa (bisa filter per kelas)
sql_template:
WITH target AS (
    SELECT g.academic_year, g.semester, s.name, s.class, s.gender
    FROM students s
    JOIN grades g ON g.student_id = s.id
    WHERE ('{kelas}' = '' OR g.class = '{kelas}' OR g.class LIKE '{kelas} %')
        AND g.academic_year IN ('{academic_year}')
        AND g.semester IN ('{semester}')
)
SELECT DISTINCT academic_year, semester, name, class, gender
FROM target
ORDER BY academic_year, semester, name
examples: Siapa saja siswa kelas X IPA?

description: Mencari siswa berdasarkan nama
sql_template:
WITH filtered AS (
    SELECT g.academic_year, g.semester, s.name, s.class, s.gender
    FROM students s
    JOIN grades g ON g.student_id = s.id
    WHERE (s.name LIKE '%{nama}%'{extra_nama_clause})
        AND g.academic_year IN ('{academic_year}')
        AND g.semester IN ('{semester}')
)
SELECT DISTINCT academic_year, semester, name, class, gender
FROM filtered
ORDER BY academic_year, semester, name

params.nama: Nama atau potongan nama siswa (contoh: Dewi, Budi)

description: Menghitung jumlah guru
sql_template:
WITH all_teachers AS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM teachers
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS count
FROM all_teachers

description: Daftar semua guru
sql_template:
WITH all_teachers AS (
    SELECT name, subject, gender
    FROM teachers
)
SELECT name, subject, gender
FROM all_teachers

description: Cari guru berdasarkan mata pelajaran
sql_template:
WITH subject_teachers AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT g.academic_year, g.semester, t.name, t.gender
    FROM teachers t
    JOIN grades g ON g.subject = t.subject
    WHERE t.subject = '{subject}'
        AND g.academic_year IN ('{academic_year}')
        AND g.semester IN ('{semester}')
)
SELECT academic_year, semester, name, gender
FROM subject_teachers
ORDER BY academic_year, semester, name

description: Daftar semua mata pelajaran
sql_template:
WITH all_subjects AS (
    SELECT name
    FROM subjects
)
SELECT name
FROM all_subjects

description: Daftar siswa berdasarkan jenis kelamin
sql_template:
WITH filtered AS (
    SELECT g.academic_year, g.semester, s.name, s.class, s.gender
    FROM students s
    JOIN grades g ON g.student_id = s.id
    WHERE s.gender = '{gender}'
        AND g.academic_year IN ('{academic_year}')
        AND g.semester IN ('{semester}')
)
SELECT DISTINCT academic_year, semester, name, class, gender
FROM filtered
ORDER BY academic_year, semester, name

description: Jumlah siswa berdasarkan jenis kelamin
sql_template:
WITH filtered AS (
    SELECT g.academic_year, g.semester, s.id
    FROM students s
    JOIN grades g ON g.student_id = s.id
    WHERE s.gender = '{gender}'
        AND g.academic_year IN ('{academic_year}')
        AND g.semester IN ('{semester}')
)
SELECT academic_year, semester, COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS count
FROM filtered
GROUP BY academic_year, semester
ORDER BY academic_year, semester

description: Rata-rata nilai seorang siswa
sql_template:
WITH student_grades AS (
    SELECT g.academic_year, g.semester, g.score
    FROM grades g
    JOIN students s ON s.id = g.student_id
    WHERE s.name LIKE '{name}%'
        AND g.academic_year IN ('{academic_year}')
        AND g.semester IN ('{semester}')
)
SELECT academic_year, semester, AVG(score) AS average
FROM student_grades
GROUP BY academic_year, semester
ORDER BY academic_year, semester

description: Siswa dengan nilai tertinggi di suatu mata pelajaran
sql_template:
WITH ranked AS (
    SELECT
        g.academic_year,
        g.semester,
        s.name,
        s.class,
        g.score,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY g.academic_year, g.semester ORDER BY g.score DESC) AS rn
    FROM grades g
    JOIN students s ON s.id = g.student_id
    WHERE g.subject = '{subject}'
        AND g.academic_year IN ('{academic_year}')
        AND g.semester IN ('{semester}')
)
SELECT academic_year, semester, name, class, score
FROM ranked
WHERE rn <= 5
ORDER BY academic_year, semester, rn
examples: Siswa dengan nilai tertinggi di matematika?

description: Jumlah siswa tidak hadir (alpha) di suatu kelas
sql_template:
WITH alpha_students AS (
    SELECT academic_year, semester, 1 AS dummy
    FROM attendance
    WHERE (class = '{kelas}' OR class LIKE '{kelas} %')
        AND status = 'alpha'
        AND academic_year IN ('{academic_year}')
        AND semester IN ('{semester}')
)
SELECT academic_year, semester, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM alpha_students
GROUP BY academic_year, semester
ORDER BY academic_year, semester
examples: Berapa siswa tidak hadir di kelas X IPA?

description: Mencari wali kelas
sql_template:
WITH teacher_match AS (
    SELECT ht.academic_year, ht.semester, t.name
    FROM homeroom_teachers ht
    JOIN teachers t ON t.id = ht.teacher_id
    WHERE ht.class = '{kelas}'
        AND ht.academic_year IN ('{academic_year}')
        AND ht.semester IN ('{semester}')
)
SELECT academic_year, semester, name
FROM teacher_match
ORDER BY academic_year, semester

description: Siswa yang mengikuti ekstrakurikuler tertentu
sql_template:
WITH participants AS (
    SELECT se.academic_year, se.semester, s.name, s.class
    FROM student_extracurriculars se
    JOIN students s ON s.id = se.student_id
    JOIN extracurriculars e ON e.id = se.extracurricular_id
    WHERE e.name = '{extracurricular}'
        AND se.academic_year IN ('{academic_year}')
        AND se.semester IN ('{semester}')
)
SELECT academic_year, semester, name, class
FROM participants
ORDER BY academic_year, semester, name

description: Jumlah siswa yang lulus (nilai >= 75) di suatu mata pelajaran
sql_template:
WITH passed AS (
    SELECT academic_year, semester, 1 AS dummy
    FROM grades
    WHERE subject = '{subject}'
        AND score >= 75
        AND academic_year IN ('{academic_year}')
        AND semester IN ('{semester}')
)
SELECT academic_year, semester, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM passed
GROUP BY academic_year, semester
ORDER BY academic_year, semester

description: Daftar guru berdasarkan jenis kelamin
sql_template:
WITH filtered AS (
    SELECT name, subject, gender
    FROM teachers
    WHERE gender = '{gender}'
)
SELECT name, subject, gender
FROM filtered

description: Jumlah siswa per kelas berdasarkan jenis kelamin
sql_template:
WITH grouped AS (
    SELECT
        g.academic_year,
        g.semester,
        s.class,
        s.gender,
        COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) AS cnt
    FROM students s
    JOIN grades g ON g.student_id = s.id
    WHERE g.academic_year IN ('{academic_year}')
        AND g.semester IN ('{semester}')
    GROUP BY g.academic_year, g.semester, s.class, s.gender
)
SELECT academic_year, semester, class, gender, cnt AS count
FROM grouped
ORDER BY academic_year, semester, class, gender
examples: Jumlah siswa per kelas berdasarkan jenis kelamin
Berapa siswa laki-laki dan perempuan tiap kelas

description: Jumlah siswa per kelas menurut tahun ajaran
sql_template:
WITH yearly AS (
    SELECT
        g.class,
        g.academic_year,
        g.semester,
        COUNT(DISTINCT g.student_id) AS cnt
    FROM grades g
    GROUP BY g.class, g.academic_year, g.semester
)
SELECT class, academic_year, semester, cnt AS count
FROM yearly
ORDER BY class, academic_year, semester
examples: Jumlah siswa per kelas menurut tahun ajaran
Berapa siswa tiap kelas setiap tahun

description: Rata-rata nilai mata pelajaran tertentu per kelas di suatu tahun ajaran
sql_template:
WITH subject_grades AS (
    SELECT g.academic_year, g.semester, s.class, g.score
    FROM grades g
    JOIN students s ON s.id = g.student_id
    WHERE g.subject = '{subject}'
        AND g.academic_year IN ('{academic_year}')
        AND g.semester IN ('{semester}')
)
SELECT academic_year, semester, class, AVG(score) AS average
FROM subject_grades
GROUP BY academic_year, semester, class
ORDER BY academic_year, semester, class
examples: Rata-rata nilai matematika tiap kelas di tahun ajaran 2024/2025

description: Siswa dengan nilai rata-rata terendah per kelas di tahun ajaran tertentu
sql_template:
WITH student_avg AS (
    SELECT
        g.academic_year,
        g.semester,
        s.class,
        s.name,
        AVG(g.score) AS average
    FROM grades g
    JOIN students s ON s.id = g.student_id
    WHERE g.academic_year IN ('{academic_year}')
        AND g.semester IN ('{semester}')
        AND ('{subject}' = '' OR g.subject = '{subject}')
    GROUP BY g.academic_year, g.semester, s.class, s.name
),
min_avg AS (
    SELECT
        academic_year,
        semester,
        class,
        MIN(average) AS min_average
    FROM student_avg
    GROUP BY academic_year, semester, class
)
SELECT
    sa.academic_year,
    sa.semester,
    sa.class,
    sa.name,
    sa.average
FROM student_avg sa
JOIN min_avg ma
    ON sa.academic_year = ma.academic_year
    AND sa.semester = ma.semester
    AND sa.class = ma.class
    AND sa.average = ma.min_average
ORDER BY sa.academic_year, sa.semester, sa.class
examples: Siapa yang memiliki nilai rata-rata terendah di tahun ajaran terakhir per kelas
Siswa dengan rata-rata terendah tiap kelas

description: Rata-rata nilai seluruh siswa di suatu kelas
sql_template:
WITH class_grades AS (
    SELECT g.academic_year, g.semester, s.name, s.class, g.score
    FROM grades g
    JOIN students s ON s.id = g.student_id
    WHERE (s.class = '{kelas}' OR s.class LIKE '{kelas} %')
        AND g.academic_year IN ('{academic_year}')
        AND g.semester IN ('{semester}')
)
SELECT academic_year, semester, name, class, AVG(score) AS average
FROM class_grades
GROUP BY academic_year, semester, name, class
ORDER BY academic_year, semester, name

description: Jumlah siswa berdasarkan status kehadiran di suatu kelas
sql_template:
WITH status_count AS (
    SELECT academic_year, semester, 1 AS dummy
    FROM attendance
    WHERE (class = '{kelas}' OR class LIKE '{kelas} %')
        AND status = '{status}'
        AND academic_year IN ('{academic_year}')
        AND semester IN ('{semester}')
)
SELECT academic_year, semester, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM status_count
GROUP BY academic_year, semester
ORDER BY academic_year, semester

params.status: Status kehadiran: hadir, izin, sakit, alpha

examples: Berapa siswa sakit di kelas X IPA?
Jumlah siswa izin di kelas XI IPS

description: Cari ekstrakurikuler berdasarkan nama pelatih
sql_template:
WITH coach_ec AS (
    SELECT name, coach
    FROM extracurriculars
    WHERE coach = '{coach}'
)
SELECT name, coach
FROM coach_ec

params.coach: Nama pelatih (contoh: Agus Wijaya, Rudi Hartono)

description: Daftar kehadiran siswa di suatu kelas pada tanggal tertentu
sql_template:
WITH att AS (
    SELECT a.academic_year, a.semester, s.name, a.status
    FROM attendance a
    JOIN students s ON s.id = a.student_id
    WHERE (a.class = '{kelas}' OR a.class LIKE '{kelas} %')
        AND a.attendance_date = '{tanggal}'
        AND a.academic_year IN ('{academic_year}')
        AND a.semester IN ('{semester}')
)
SELECT academic_year, semester, name, status
FROM att
ORDER BY academic_year, semester, name
examples: Siapa saja yang hadir di kelas X IPA tanggal 2024-01-10?
Kehadiran siswa kelas XI IPS pada 2024-02-10

description: Siswa dengan rata-rata nilai tertinggi di semua mata pelajaran
sql_template:
WITH ranked AS (
    SELECT
        g.academic_year,
        g.semester,
        s.name,
        s.class,
        AVG(g.score) AS average,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY g.academic_year, g.semester ORDER BY AVG(g.score) DESC) AS rn
    FROM grades g
    JOIN students s ON s.id = g.student_id
    WHERE g.academic_year IN ('{academic_year}')
        AND g.semester IN ('{semester}')
    GROUP BY g.academic_year, g.semester, s.name, s.class
)
SELECT academic_year, semester, name, class, ROUND(average, 2) AS average
FROM ranked
WHERE rn <= 5
ORDER BY academic_year, semester, rn
examples: Siapa siswa dengan rata-rata tertinggi semester ini?

description: Daftar siswa yang tidak hadir (alpha), opsional filter kelas
sql_template:
WITH alpha_list AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT a.academic_year, a.semester, s.name, s.class
    FROM attendance a
    JOIN students s ON s.id = a.student_id
    WHERE a.status = 'alpha'
        AND ('{kelas}' = '' OR a.class = '{kelas}' OR a.class LIKE '{kelas} %')
        AND a.academic_year IN ('{academic_year}')
        AND a.semester IN ('{semester}')
)
SELECT academic_year, semester, name, class
FROM alpha_list
ORDER BY academic_year, semester, class, name
examples: Siapa yang suka tidak masuk kelas?
Siapa saja yang tidak hadir di kelas X IPA?

description: BP Batam: Total permohonan izin masuk per minggu (Executive Summary)
sql_template:
SELECT
    CAST(TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'IW') AS TIMESTAMP) AS PERIODE,
    COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_MASUK
FROM US_DWH.BI_MART_STATUS_PERIZINAN
WHERE PERIZINAN IN ('PL', 'PB', 'PBUMKU', 'PKKPRL', 'PB')
  AND {tgl_status_terakhir}
  AND {perizinan}
GROUP BY TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'IW')
ORDER BY TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'IW') ASC

description: BP Batam: Izin terbit per minggu (Executive Summary)
sql_template:
SELECT
    CAST(TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'IW') AS TIMESTAMP) AS PERIODE,
    COUNT(*) AS IZIN_TERBIT
FROM US_DWH.BI_MART_STATUS_PERIZINAN
WHERE KATEGORI_STATUS = 'Terbit'
  AND PERIZINAN IN ('PB', 'PBUMKU', 'PL', 'PKKPRL', 'PPKH')
  AND {tgl_status_terakhir}
  AND {perizinan}
GROUP BY TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'IW')
ORDER BY TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'IW') ASC

description: BP Batam: Total backlog (belum terbit) per minggu (Executive Summary)
sql_template:
SELECT
    CAST(TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'IW') AS TIMESTAMP) AS PERIODE,
    COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_BACKLOG
FROM US_DWH.BI_MART_STATUS_PERIZINAN
WHERE KATEGORI_STATUS NOT IN ('Terbit')
  AND KATEGORI_STATUS NOT LIKE '%Ditolak%'
  AND KATEGORI_STATUS NOT LIKE '%Batal%'
  AND PERIZINAN IN ('PB', 'PBUMKU', 'PL', 'PKKPRL', 'PPKH')
  AND {tgl_status_terakhir}
  AND {perizinan}
GROUP BY TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'IW')
ORDER BY TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'IW') ASC

description: BP Batam: Permohonan izin yang masih dalam proses per hari (Executive Summary)
sql_template:
SELECT
    TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'DD') AS TANGGAL,
    COUNT(*) AS JUMLAH_PERMOHONAN
FROM US_DWH.BI_MART_STATUS_PERIZINAN
WHERE UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) LIKE '%DALAM PROSES%'
  AND TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR IS NOT NULL
  AND PERIZINAN IN ('PB', 'PBUMKU', 'PL', 'PKKPRL', 'PPKH')
  AND {tgl_status_terakhir}
  AND {perizinan}
GROUP BY TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'DD')
ORDER BY TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'DD') ASC

description: BP Batam: Sebaran permohonan berdasarkan jenis izin dan kelompok status (Executive Summary)
sql_template:
SELECT
    CASE PERIZINAN
        WHEN 'PBUMKU' THEN 'PBUMKU'
        WHEN 'PB' THEN 'PB'
        WHEN 'PL' THEN 'PL'
        WHEN 'PKKPRL' THEN 'PKKPRL'
        WHEN 'PPKH' THEN 'PPKH'
        ELSE PERIZINAN
    END AS JENIS_IZIN,
    CASE
        WHEN KATEGORI_STATUS = 'Terbit' THEN 'Terbit'
        WHEN KATEGORI_STATUS LIKE '%Tolak%'
          OR KATEGORI_STATUS LIKE '%Ditolak%'
          OR KATEGORI_STATUS LIKE '%Rejected%' THEN 'Tolak'
        ELSE 'Proses'
    END AS KELOMPOK_STATUS,
    COUNT(*) AS JUMLAH
FROM US_DWH.BI_MART_STATUS_PERIZINAN
WHERE 1 = 1
  AND PERIZINAN IN ('PL', 'PBUMKU', 'PKKPRL', 'PPKH', 'PB')
  AND {kategori_status}
  AND {perizinan}
  AND {tgl_status_terakhir}
GROUP BY
    PERIZINAN,
    CASE
        WHEN KATEGORI_STATUS = 'Terbit' THEN 'Terbit'
        WHEN KATEGORI_STATUS LIKE '%Tolak%'
          OR KATEGORI_STATUS LIKE '%Ditolak%'
          OR KATEGORI_STATUS LIKE '%Rejected%' THEN 'Tolak'
        ELSE 'Proses'
    END
ORDER BY JUMLAH DESC

description: BP Batam: Komposisi keseluruhan status perizinan per minggu (Executive Summary)
sql_template:
SELECT
    CAST(TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'IW') AS TIMESTAMP) AS PERIODE,
    CASE
        WHEN KATEGORI_STATUS = 'Terbit' THEN 'Terbit'
        WHEN KATEGORI_STATUS LIKE '%Tolak%'
          OR KATEGORI_STATUS LIKE '%Ditolak%'
          OR KATEGORI_STATUS LIKE '%Rejected%' THEN 'Ditolak'
        ELSE 'Dalam Proses'
    END AS KELOMPOK_STATUS,
    COUNT(*) AS JUMLAH
FROM US_DWH.BI_MART_STATUS_PERIZINAN
WHERE {tgl_status_terakhir}
  AND PERIZINAN IN ('PB', 'PBUMKU', 'PL', 'PKKPRL', 'PPKH')
  AND {perizinan}
  AND {kategori_status}
GROUP BY
    TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'IW'),
    CASE
        WHEN KATEGORI_STATUS = 'Terbit' THEN 'Terbit'
        WHEN KATEGORI_STATUS LIKE '%Tolak%'
          OR KATEGORI_STATUS LIKE '%Ditolak%'
          OR KATEGORI_STATUS LIKE '%Rejected%' THEN 'Ditolak'
        ELSE 'Dalam Proses'
    END
ORDER BY TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'IW') ASC, JUMLAH DESC
examples: Rekap status izin terbit ditolak proses
